prestazioni: Engine swap to D16Y8 (1.6L SOHC VTEC, 127hp stock) with a custom-tuned Hondata K-Pro v4 ECU map optimized for 10.5:1 compression, 272° Skunk2 Pro Series camshafts, and a Toda Racing high-flow intake manifold with 64mm throttle body for 180whp on pump gas

Forced induction via Garrett GT2860RS turbo (0.63 A/R, 60 trim) on a custom manifold with 38mm wastegate, paired with a GReddy Type-S intercooler and 3.5-inch stainless steel piping, tuned for 12psi boost and 250whp with supporting mods (ARP head studs, ACL Race Series bearings, and a Koyorad 2-row aluminum radiator)

Full drivetrain reinforcement: Clutch Masters FX400 clutch kit, 4.785 final drive ratio (from a Honda Civic EK9), Cusco 2-way limited-slip differential, and a custom driveshaft with 300M steel CV joints to handle increased torque
estetica: J's Racing bolt-on widebody kit (front fenders + rear quarter panels) with custom carbon fiber overfenders to fit 17x9 +30 Enkei RPF1 wheels wrapped in 225/45/17 Toyo R888R tires, paired with Buddy Club Racing Spec coilovers (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear) for aggressive stance

Custom Rocket Bunny-inspired front bumper with integrated D2 Racing 320mm brake ducts, a carbon fiber hood (Seibon Type-1) with a 3-inch cowl scoop, and a custom rear diffuser with dual 3.5-inch exhaust outlets (custom 304 stainless steel piping with a HKS Hi-Power muffler)

Full OEM+ interior overhaul: Recaro SRD-E bucket seats with custom mounting brackets, NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub, and a custom roll cage (1.75-inch DOM tubing) with bolt-in door bars, painted Honda Championship White (R-510) to match the exterior
